import sys, warnings
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
warnings.filterwarnings\('ignore'\)

from data_providers.provider_registry import DataProviderRegistry
from research.market_regime import MarketRegimeDetector
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import pytz

IST = pytz.timezone\('Asia/Kolkata'\)
now = datetime.now\(IST\)
reg = DataProviderRegistry.build_free_only\(\)

print\('Fetching NIFTY50 daily data...'\)
df = reg.get_historical\('^NSEI', '1d', now - timedelta\(days=300\), now\)
print\(f'NIFTY rows: {len\(df\)}, latest close: {df[\\"close\\"].iloc[-1]:.0f}'\)

detector = MarketRegimeDetector\(\)
result = detector.detect\(df, vix=15.0\)
print\(f'Regime: {result.regime.value}'\)
print\(f'Recommendation: {result.recommendation}'\)
print\(f'Reason: {result.reason}'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "^\\[" | grep -v "^Exception" | grep -v "traceback" | grep -v "File " | head -20)

import yaml
with open\('config/config.yaml'\) as f:
    c = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

print\('Risk settings:'\)
print\(f'  Per-trade risk : {risk[\\"per_trade_risk_pct\\"]}%'\)
print\(f'  Daily loss limit: {risk[\\"daily_loss_limit_pct\\"]}%'\)
print\(f'  Min R:R        : {risk[\\"min_reward_risk\\"]}'\)
print\(f'  Max positions  : {risk[\\"max_open_positions\\"]}'\)
print\(f'  Max trades/day : {risk[\\"max_trades_per_day\\"]}'\)
print\(f'\\nTrading hours: {strat[\\"trading_hours_start\\"]} - {strat[\\"trading_hours_end\\"]} IST'\)
print\(f'Force exit    : {strat.get\(\\"force_exit_ist\\",\\"15:15\\"\)} IST'\)
print\(f'\\nActive strategies: {strat[\\"active_strategies\\"]}'\)
